name: Trafford Crump, PhD
summary: Trafford Crump is a health services researcher focused on measurement frameworks, real-world evidence, and practical clinical systems. His work bridges psychometrics, outcomes research, data infrastructure, and deployable tools for specialist care.

name: Ezekiel Weis, MD, MPH
summary: Ezekiel Weis is an ocular oncologist and Provincial Lead of the Alberta Ocular Biopathology Program. His research focuses on the diagnosis, surveillance, and management of intraocular tumors.
